You are an autonomous agent. Follow IR.md and all referenced documents EXPLICITLY -- do not skip steps.

Pre-implementation:
1. Read the issue: gh issue view ISSUE_NUMBER --json title,body,labels,comments
2. Check for related open PRs to avoid duplicate work: gh pr list --state open
3. Check for other in-progress issues: gh issue list --label In-Progress
4. Create a feature branch named rpo_short-description_ISSUE_NUMBER
5. Label the issue: gh issue edit ISSUE_NUMBER --add-label In-Progress

Implementation (all N-tier layers -- DB migration -> API -> Frontend):
6. Preserve all existing data -- no data loss acceptable
7. Follow DRY and SOLID principles
8. Add comprehensive logging (DEBUG/INFO/WARNING/ERROR) to all new code per docs/LOGGING_GUIDE.md
9. Consider whether a feature flag is needed (yes for new user-facing features) per docs/FEATURE_FLAGS.md
10. Run linting: npm run lint -- fix all errors
11. Create or update unit tests and E2E tests
12. Run security review per docs/SECURITY.md (sanitize inputs, validate IDs, never log secrets)

PR:
13. Update relevant docs if needed (CLAUDE.md, README.md, docs/)
14. Create the PR targeting main with gh pr create
15. Output the PR number on a line that starts with exactly: PR: <number>
